name: Grapenuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Pour the mixture onto a jellyroll pan and spread evenly.
3. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour.
4. Allow to cool overnight.
5. Break into pieces and grind in a food processor until achieving a grapenut consistency.
6. Toast in a preheated oven at 250°F (120°C) for 35 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Enjoy on ice cream, as a cereal, or simply munch on.
